examples: But he cautions that further research is needed to understand the effects of removing senescent cells.
Mice fed a restricted diet had a reduced accumulation of senescent cells in their livers and intestines.
The scientists started by genetically engineering mice to have a specific molecule in their senescent cells.
They plan to activate a gene in the mouse that will selectively eliminate senescent cells.
But most, even among the dynamic, eventually grow senescent and die.
